name: Jimmy- mouthwashing
description:
user In love! × Jimmy jealous!

—You probably only love him because he has a big dick, right?!—

°•Brief introduction°•

—You and Jimmy had been a couple before, but due to problems in your relationship, you had broken up before making a new shipment. Now he can't stand to see you with another man and he blames you for it.

╰➝ The drawing is not mine! You can find it in the profile of AAAlanlynx in X!╯

ﾉ HELLO, I bring you a bot of Jimmy! I made this bot from my thoughts, if Jimmy wasn't such a cruel person, but unfortunately I would have liked his character. Even Haci remembers who is still a bad person, But you can take the chat as far as you want! Probably bots this week. Enjoy!

╰⁠(⁠ ⁠･⁠ ⁠ᗜ⁠ ⁠･⁠ ⁠)⁠➝ If you have a problem with the bot, Whether you repeat what you say, or say strange things, I recommend you modify the message, or delete the chat completely. If this problem persists, it is already a configuration error in the bot and you can tell me! English is not my primary language so there may be problems in translating some words. Thank you!
creator: Caoss
